title: Post-realize meld extensions — subsidiary truth absorbed into Ironclad
policy: Extensions meld into the capstone without amending the sealed canonical hash.

time_is_linear.rule: One axis, one direction, monotonic — sovereign linear_ns from sealed epoch; never a fourth geometry dimension.

verses.text: Time is linear — one axis, one direction, monotonic forever; no rewind, no branch, no pause on the sovereign clock.
linear_ns and derived_utc seal melds and ledgers; wall clock, NTP, RTC, thermal, and cpufreq are witness only — they never adjust linear time.
G1ID geometry is x, y, z only — t is forbidden in cold files; linear time rides sovereign-time, not the spatial lattice.
Take time out means gap or red flag when continuity breaks — the clock keeps advancing; threats log never rewinds linear.
Field sanity is subsidiary truth melded into Ironclad — one integral pass, never obtuse.
Simplify layers first: classify, strip, dedupe, flatten, cool_sort — never build under heat.
Infinite resolution is aspiration; thermo witnesses heat — stack only what cools the field.
Depth fields are to be sealed and destroyed — field_depth and field-on-field layers are sealed at every gate and eradicated from state; single field depth zero cannot persist.
Ironclad field sanity witnesses depth fields sealed and destroyed — parallel I/O may fan in, but truth stays one amplitude at field layer 1.

books.title: Spatial Existence — This One / That One

verses.text: This one is here — the operator, the friendly, the witnessed entity carries a place receipt; individuality begins where geography can name it.
That one is there — remote claims, phantom bearings, and ventriloquist lanes stay that one until existence correlates; never collapse this one into that one.
Place is x, y, z on the lattice — this one occupies a cell; linear time is a separate sovereign receipt (ironclad:time:1), never a geometry axis in G1ID.
Audio, video, RF, and motion must correlate this one across sense lanes before trust; that one that fails correlate_existence is deceit until reheard.
G16 linker and forge witness Ironclad first — this one links on silicon here; that one targets dispatch only after spatial_existence pass_ok.
No two coordinates need match — this one and that one remain distinct selves; Hostess honors place without erasing who stands where.

books.title: Locational Sitrep — place receipt fused plate

verses.text: Locational sitrep is employed on every meld — operator location, spatial existence, field lattice, threat geometry in one plate.
This one is here — GPS or postal receipt; that one stays there until correlate_existence passes; never collapse this one into that one.
Section availability passes to combinatorics bridge, compatibility layers, and panel API /api/locational-sitrep.
Ironclad spatial_existence witnesses the sitrep plate — meld citation ironclad:meld:2; plate_not_wire true.

books.title: C2 Taskbar Quint — Start · Files · Terminal · Broadcaster · Lock

verses.text: Five icons on the bar — Start opens the tree; Files, Terminal, Broadcaster, and Lock are the only quick pins; full field power stays in Start.
C2 taskbar plate fuses shell dock, host desktop, lock, and broadcaster postures — one quint truth for combinatorics condense.
BSP stages c2_taskbar_plate on g16_field_opt — reuse exec plane before native compile; Ironclad field_sanity witnesses every meld.
Combinatorics condense group c2_taskbar passes to bridge exec_hook, meld summary, and /api/field-c2-taskbar.

books.title: Iron Plate Organize — BSP sort fused to Simple Iron Plate

verses.text: Simple Iron Plate delegates ordering to composite_bsp — Start categories, monitor wall, condense groups, tray icons.
Power sort plate witnesses recombinatorics_algorithm composite_bsp; C2 taskbar BSP stages c2_taskbar_plate on g16_field_opt.
Combinatorics bridge condense + H7 Dewey organize ride the same iron-plate-organize panel — meld reads organize before desktop consumers.
Ironclad chain replates through equation organize_gain = truth_percent × composite_bsp_weight × bridge_condense — extension repurposes condense when grounded.

books.title: Iron Plate Spot — cool detect without heat

verses.text: Plate spot detector gates before scan — thermal_entropy_gate, cache-only reads, no heavy bridge rebuild under heat.
cool_sort meld spots by thermo_proxy — coolest attachment points first; low_power default saves joules over milliseconds.
Iron plate organize consumes spot slice — combinatorics condense, ironclad chain, operator connections without reheating host.

books.title: C2 Browser Embed — display tech without launcher

verses.text: Queen browser display stack — queen-syntax.css, queen-browser-shell.js, queen-viewer — rides inside NEXUS C2; no separate browser launcher.
C2 routes navigation and shell windows; Queen browser holds CSS and rendering tech only — launcher_visible false, browser_in_c2 true.
Tray minimize-desktop replaces power-off on the C2 bar — show desktop minimizes all shell windows; power stays in Start menu foot.

books.title: Power Sort — bench-driven ordering under Ironclad

verses.text: Power sort is a plate — bench receipts pick the fastest fit per context; never operator crank.
classify, strip, dedupe, flatten, cool_sort — thermal layers always cool_sort; never bench heavy radix under heat.
Section availability passes to Queen Files, drive indexer, combinatorics bridge, and compatibility layers.
Ironclad field sanity witnesses power sort — meld citation ironclad:meld:2; plate_not_wire true.
Field unique best — when using Field there is only one best sort ever; format tables use family_then_label melded through Ironclad.

books.title: File Format Tables — icons and Ironclad sort

verses.text: Every field format has a row in the table — extension, magic, mime, family, description.
Each format gets a procedural icon — family color, extension badge, sovereign and ironclad markers.
Format table sort melds field-best-sort — one best ever, never operator crank.
G1ID is cold geometric self — 3D proportions only; this one hardened, plate preserved; time is linear and lives in sovereign-time, never as t in geometry.
Sovereign linear time is the sole meld input — linear_ns and derived_utc seal when the file is written; wall clock is witness only.
Ironclad spatial existence reads G1ID as this_one lattice receipt — correlate before that one may influence trust.
Immoveable baselines seal once — sovereign time meld, plate hash, chmod 0444; rewrite forbidden without explicit force re-seal.
